message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_14-27-28_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "standard sword damage 500 G yields payout 400 G (500 - 100 deductible)"
Expected behavior: claim returns payout 400 for 500G damage with 100G deductible
Current error: Expected 400, received 0
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_14-27-28_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

Implement claim minimally: for each damage, payout = max(0, amount - 100 deductible). Sum across damages.
Return { payout: Math.floor(totalPayout) } - rounding DOWN per spec.

For 500G damage: max(0, 500-100) = 400. Return { payout: 400 }.

Don't worry about cap, special clauses, dragon material, item validation yet — those come in later tests.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal code to make the failing test pass.

- **Result**: All tests pass (24 passing, 19 todo)
